message:
feat(vdbe): implement virtual table opcodes, INSERT conflict resolution, and comparison affinity coercion

Wire all remaining VTable opcodes (VOpen, VFilter, VColumn, VNext,
VUpdate, VBegin, VCreate, VDestroy, VCheck, VInitIn, VRename) with
type-erased cursor/instance dispatch so the engine can host
heterogeneous vtab modules. Add comprehensive tests with a
MockVtabCursor covering scan loops, empty-cursor jumps, and no-op
fallthrough cases.

Implement INSERT OR IGNORE and INSERT OR REPLACE conflict resolution
in IdxInsert by encoding the oe_flag in P5 bits 1-4. IGNORE undoes
the table row and skips remaining index inserts; REPLACE finds the
conflicting row via index seek, deletes it, then inserts the new
entry. Propagate oe_flag from codegen through emit_index_inserts.

Add SQLite comparison affinity coercion (section 3.2): when one
operand is numeric and the other is text, coerce the text to numeric
before comparing. This fixes WHERE clauses comparing integer columns
against string literals.

Fix AUTOINCREMENT rowid allocation to consult the sqlite_sequence
high-water mark (bd-31j76), preventing rowid reuse after deletion.

Make set_reg_fast auto-resize the register file instead of asserting,
supporting both builder-allocated and hand-crafted test programs.

Switch metrics tests from global reset to delta-based snapshots with
a JIT_SETTINGS_LOCK mutex, eliminating flaky failures from parallel
test execution.

Add generated column metadata fields (generated_expr, generated_stored)
to ColumnInfo for future STORED/VIRTUAL column support.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
